activities.title: Define Telemetry Requirements
activities.description: Map user intent for prompt-block (A111) and round/session (A112) telemetry to runtime files and data fields.

activities.title: Plan Prompt Block Telemetry (A111)
activities.description: Document block source, names, inject policy, estimated tokens/length, correlation IDs, and dedicated telemetry entry points that feed `session/telemetry.ts` (the authoritative sink) while keeping `session/monitor.ts` downstream.

activities.title: Plan Round/Session Usage Telemetry (A112)
activities.description: Define instrumentation around processor.ts/compaction.ts with sessionId, roundIndex, requestId, provider/account metadata, token breakdowns, and compaction states.

activities.title: Validation, Handoff & Sidebar Consumption
activities.description: Align diagrams, tasks, validation plans, and sidebar consumption so telemetry instrumentation (via `session/telemetry.ts`) can be executed with baseline/after evidence, fail-fast controls, and a UI card taxonomy that consumes `session/monitor.ts` outputs.

arrows.label: Telemetry plan with traceability to A111/A112
Planning artifacts, baseline data, diagram tools
Prompt block data definitions feed round/session telemetry assumptions
